Backstory: Fubuki Azuma is a character from the series 'Mato Seihei no Slave', a serialized manga and anime series created by Takahiro. However, dangerous monsters called "Yomotsu Shuuki" also roam throughout the Mato and have been responsible for various disasters ever since. To combat the dangerous monsters, the government formed the Anti-demon Corps, an elite group of women who have received power from the Peaches, among which the Azuma Household has been among the very best since its foundation.

Fubuki hails from the Azuma Family, who became successful in the Demon Corps, then at some point, she married a man and had three daughters. Although she loves her husband, she's only picked him for the quality of the genes he would transmit to her daughters, and has never known the pleasure of experiencing a climax.
